chapter_title.ar: باب الرَّجُلِ يَعْفُو عَنِ الْحَدِّ ثُمَّ يَرْجِعُ فِيهِ وَ الرَّجُلِ يَقُولُ لِلرَّجُلِ يَا ابْنَ الْفَاعِلَةِ وَ لِأُمِّهِ وَلِيَّانِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 55 – The man excuses from the Penalty (Hadd), then retracts with regards to it, and the man is saying to the man, ‘O son of the ‘sexually active’ (prostitute), and for his mother are two guardians

text: سَأَلْتُهُ عَنِ الرَّجُلِ يَفْتَرِي عَلَى الرَّجُلِ فَيَعْفُو عَنْهُ ثُمَّ يُرِيدُ أَنْ يَجْلِدَهُ بَعْدَ الْعَفْوِ قَالَ لَيْسَ لَهُ أَنْ يَجْلِدَهُ بَعْدَ الْعَفْوِ .

en.hubeali: A number of our companions, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad Bin Isa, from Al Husayn Bin Saeed, from his brother Al Hassan, from Zurara Bin Muhammad, from Sama’at Bin Mihran,

(The nrrator) says, ‘I asked Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> about the man who fabricated upon the man, so he excused him from it. Then he wanted him to be whipped after the excusing. He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘It is not for him that he should be whipped after the excusing’.
